customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals present. Customer is cooperative and socially pleasant, but there is no evidence of active motivation — they returned the call out of courtesy and agreed to re-book without resistance. The absence of anxiety is not the same as the presence of interest.
unresolved_concerns: Customer's original motivation for solar was never re-surfaced on this call — unknown whether interest is still active or has cooled since the original inquiry.
No bill pain was anchored or re-anchored — the closer has no emotional foundation to build from.
The email mention at button-up may have created an expectation that the proposal will be sent by email before the call — this conflicts with the hard rule on proposals.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment will be a phone call.
Customer was asked to have access to email during the call so the specialist can email over information.
closer_should_know: This customer agreed to re-book cooperatively but arrived at the appointment with no re-established motivation — the setter did not surface why they were originally interested in solar, and no bill pain was anchored. The closer should be prepared to establish the customer's interest and connect it to their specific situation before presenting anything, rather than assuming the customer is already primed. Also: the email mention at close may have set an expectation that materials arrive before the call — worth addressing early if the customer raises it.
